Petition To Establish, Join, And Fund A Sub-Account For Rosa Cheung Into The California Charities Pooled Special Needs Trust;
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch appeared by zoom for and with Diana Kwan (Petitioner) by zoom.

The Court stated that it believes the recent filing satisfies the issues that were raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition to Establish, Join and Fund a Sub-Account for Rosa Cheung Into the California Charities Pooled Special Needs Trust is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Status on the issue of an appropriate amount of bond is set for May 3, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Urabatsch is to copy of the revised order from March 18th to the Probate Examiner.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
